holdings.infoBox: VONV is an equity ETF with a total of 886 individual holdings. The top holdings are Berkshire Hathaway stock at 2.66%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.45%, Alphabet at 2.40%, Amazon.com at 2.13%, and Exxon Mobil at 1.98%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Russell 1000 Value ETF (VONV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 1000 Value index. The fund tracks an index of US large- and mid-cap stocks selected from the Russell 1000 Index for value characteristics. VONV was launched on Sep 20, 2010 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Vanguard announces fee cuts for nearly 100 funds, including ETFs with billions of dollars in assets
data.text: The asset manager said this is its biggest fee cut ever and will save investors about $350 million this year.
